purpose: Track online semantic datasets before download, conversion, approval, and formal training.

sources.name: kaanrkaraman/code2doc
sources.recommended_initial_use: Select high-quality C++ function-documentation pairs for API intent and implementation semantics.

sources.name: driesverachtert/basic_shapes_object_detection
sources.recommended_initial_use: Use square/circle/triangle labels and COCO-format boxes for geometry-aware image recognition smoke and initial semantics.
sources.download_scope: full dataset is small; metadata and image samples first

sources.name: gudo7208/CAD-Coder
sources.recommended_initial_use: Prefer high-quality and CoT subsets for sketch, extrusion, coordinate, and CadQuery operation semantics.

sources.name: Model Context Protocol official specification schema
sources.recommended_initial_use: Extract tool definitions, tool call contracts, resource contracts, result fields, and error handling semantics.
sources.download_scope: schema pages and current codex-lan-agent tools/list output

sources.name: IUTVanguard/PhysicsEval
sources.recommended_initial_use: Filter mechanics and kinematics examples for translation, rotation, velocity, acceleration, force, and constraint semantics.
sources.download_scope: mechanics and kinematics small sample only

sources.name: 332F/visual_genome
sources.recommended_initial_use: Use only a reviewed object-attribute-relation slice for image relationship semantics; do not download full images initially.

acquisition_steps.action: Confirm each source license and download path.
Download only small samples or metadata into data/semantic_sources.
Convert samples into LM records, KG triples, and tool capability records.
Run manual user review before any formal training.
